title: Heat Treat Technician | Aerospace [ Shiftt ]
description:
• Shift Work
  • 8am– 5.18pm / 5pm – 2.18am 
  • Located at Loyang
  • Basic $2500 to $2800 + Shift Allowance + OT payable
  • With AWS and Performance Bonus


Responsibilities

  • Perform repair process by applying current & approved technical data and job instructions
  • Set up, operate and maintain EBW, TIG, VFS, Chemical Cleaning Line, Hot Press equipment using approved job instructions and SOP.
  • Perform burnout cycle for VFS as per approved schedule. 
  • Coordinate with Maintenance Team to remove and clean chemical tanks as per approved chedule. 
  • Perform daily 5S and machine preventive maintenance using approved PM checklist
  • Perform simple machine trouble shooting; solve technical issues and problems where appropriate in daily work.
  • Maintain tooling and fixtures for EBW, TIG, VFS, Hot Press and Chemical Cleaning process, segregate worn out tooling and fixtures and report to OM for action
  • Participate in audits, inspections, new product development and CI programs when required.
  • Comply with and support EHS, Quality, Code of Ethics and all Company rules and regulations
  • To train others and to be trained to upgrade skills levels continually.
  • Assist Operations Leaders in their day-to-day operations to achieve company goals
  • Carry out any other duties when assigned from time to time


Requirements

  • NITEC in Precision Machining/Mechanical Engineering/Mechatronics
  • Experience in TIG and / or EB Welding, Heat Treat, Chemical Cleaning process preferably in MRO environment.

Applicants who possess relevant experience for the above responsibilities are most welcome to apply. If you do not possess the above experience, your application will still be considered on individual merits and you may be contacted for other opportunities. 

By submitting your personal data and/or resume, you give consent to collection, use and disclosure of your personal data and/or resume by the company (or its agent) for the purpose of the processing and administration by the company relating to this job application. 

**We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified

Interested applicants may send their resume to apply95@talentvis.com or click APPLY NOW

Talentvis Singapore Pte Ltd | EA License No: 04C3537
EA Personnel Name: Mok Mun Teng (Katrina) | EA Personnel No: R25157733
